metadata.description: Generate clear exhibition interactive installation concept diagrams that explain gameplay, spatial fit, hardware logic, and media feedback content.

plugins.name: exhibit-interaction-diagram
plugins.description: Turns exhibition, multimedia, museum, and spatial interactive ideas into readable installation gameplay diagrams. It supports direct image generation, idea expansion, failure review, hardware/spatial grounding, human-scale locking, carrier recognition, information-content design, and regression testing through curated prompts and visual assets.
